creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

I've made some corrections and some improvement in the ports :


rm -r wbar/files <- we don't need patches now
Add some configure args
Add ${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE} insted of url
Add GETTEXT for disable "port test" warn

There is a new soft in the wbar : wbar-config. That's can make trouble 
with old .wbar conf.


Thanks you
